item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts R R Kabel Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1994
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, R R Kabel Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 1994 on 12 Jun 2026, marking a 54.28% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained fundamental growth, setting the stock apart in a market where the Sensex has declined by 8.8% over the same period. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Advance Petrochemicals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 314
item.description: With a remarkable 121.36% gain over the past 17 trading days, Advance Petrochemicals Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 314 on 12 Jun 2026, defying the broader market's downward trend and signalling robust price momentum backed by a suite of bullish technical indicators. Time: 4 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 12 Jun 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,343.75 as the stock faced significant price pressure. The day’s performance reflected a 3.24% drop, underperforming its sector and broader market indices amid a generally bearish market sentiment. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure
item.description: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,296.4, reflecting a 3.24% drop as the stock faced sustained selling pressure amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. Time: 8 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as CDG Petchem Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: CDG Petchem Ltd, a player in the Plastic Products - Industrial sector, achieved a significant milestone on 12 May 2026 as its stock price reached an all-time high of Rs.213.60. This landmark event reflects the company’s remarkable market performance and sustained upward momentum over recent months and years. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd Opens 19.85% Lower in Sharp Gap Down as Technicals Point to Mixed Signals
item.description: Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd experienced a sharp gap down at market open on 12 May 2026, reflecting heightened market concerns and a weak start to the trading day. The stock opened with a loss of 19.85%, significantly underperforming its sector and broader market indices, signalling a cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Power Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Adani Power Ltd experienced a notable decline today, touching an intraday low of Rs 214.95, down 3.22% as the stock faced significant price pressure amid a broadly negative market environment. The stock underperformed its sector and the broader Sensex index, continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen a cumulative fall of 6.6%. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Vindhya Telelinks Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 12 May 2026
item.description: Vindhya Telelinks Ltd experienced a notable intraday decline on 12 May 2026, touching a low of Rs 1,687.5 as the stock faced significant price pressure. The telecom equipment company underperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting a shift in market sentiment and immediate selling pressure. Time: 23 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Black Box Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 818.4
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Black Box Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 818.4 on 12 May 2026, marking a remarkable rally of 93.9% over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of sustained technical momentum, even as the broader market struggles to hold ground. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Welspun Corp Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 1346
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1346 on 12 Jun 2026, Welspun Corp Ltd. has reached a new 52-week and all-time high, marking a remarkable 75.73% gain over the past year. This rally stands in stark contrast to the broader market’s decline, as the Sensex trades near its 52-week low, underscoring the stock’s exceptional momentum and technical strength. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Global Infratech & Finance Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 30.65
item.description: After a sustained rally spanning 21 consecutive trading sessions, Global Infratech & Finance Ltd surged to a new 52-week high of Rs 30.65 on 12 May 2026, marking a remarkable 50.91% gain over this period and signalling robust price momentum despite a broadly declining market backdrop. Time: 29 minutes ago

item.title: Strong Momentum Meets Stretched Valuations as R R Kabel Ltd Reaches All-Time High
item.description: R R Kabel Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching an all-time high price of Rs 1,983.85 on 12 May 2026, reflecting a strong upward trajectory driven by solid financial results and sustained operational excellence within the cables electricals sector. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Paradeep Phosphates Ltd Surges 7.06% to Day's High of Rs 132 — Outperforms Sector by 8.02 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 1.02% on 12 May 2026, yet Paradeep Phosphates Ltd surged 7.06%, marking a remarkable 8.02 percentage-point outperformance over its Fertilizers sector peers. This strong intraday performance stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly weak market environment. Time: 38 minutes ago

item.title: Sasken Technologies Ltd Surges 7.69% to Day's High of Rs 1773.9 — Outperforms Sector by 10.16 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex declined by 1.02% on 12 May 2026, while Sasken Technologies Ltd surged 7.69%, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1773.9. This 10.16 percentage-point outperformance against the IT - Software sector’s 3.51% fall highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide uplift. Time: 38 minutes ago

item.title: Nirlon Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 615 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Nirlon Ltd, a key player in the Diversified Commercial Services sector, reached an all-time high on 12 May 2026, closing near its 52-week peak at Rs 614.15. This milestone reflects the company’s sustained performance and positive market momentum, underscored by strong financial and technical indicators. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Dalmia Bharat Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Dalmia Bharat Ltd, a mid-cap player in the Cement & Cement Products sector, has witnessed a notable 16.4% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite trading close to its 52-week low, the stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, prompting a closer examination of volume patterns, futures and options data, and potential directional bets shaping its near-term outlook. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Kaynes Technology India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Kaynes Technology India Ltd (KAYNES), a mid-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, rising by 18.41% to 59,095 contracts from the previous 49,907. This spike in OI comes alongside a notable decline in the stock price, which has fallen 4.15% on the day and underperformed its sector by 2.7%, signalling a potential shift in market positioning and investor sentiment. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Fortis Healthcare Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Fortis Healthcare Ltd has witnessed a significant 18.75% rise in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest 0.7% decline in the stock price on 12 May 2026, the surge in open interest alongside rising volumes suggests a complex interplay of directional bets and hedging strategies within the hospital sector. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: ABB India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Declining Prices
item.description: ABB India Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, rising by 28.63% to 52,056 contracts, even as the stock price declined by 2.44% on 12 May 2026. This divergence between rising open interest and falling prices signals a complex shift in market positioning, warranting a closer examination of volume patterns, investor sentiment, and potential directional bets. Time: 39 minutes ago

item.title: Canara Bank Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Renewed Market Optimism
item.description: Canara Bank has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market participation and shifting investor positioning. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting renewed interest amid a backdrop of mixed technical indicators and improving delivery volumes. Time: 39 minutes ago
